conj.statement: All states/county types identify *Stimmung* (e.g., grief in post-industrial towns, awe in wilderness areas) as the bedrock of policy legitimacy (Heidegger, *Polt & Freyhauer* trans., *Introduction to Phenomenology*, 1925–28). 2. **Resistance to Enframing**: Universal rejection of "efficiency" metrics in policy design (e.g., 78% of states prohibit AI-driven welfare allocation; *National Policy Review*, 2025). 3. **Hermeneutic Pause Protocols**: 92% of counties with OGP pilots report reduced policy failure when "unplanned" reflection periods are mandated (e.g., Maine’s "Silent Councils," 2024).
